title: Gree GMV6 outdoor fault and protection codes
description: Manual-bound Chapter 3 Error Indication catalog for GMV6 outdoor-unit codes.
notes: One-manual source boundary: GC202001-I, GMV6 only. Exact table wording is stored in sourceMeaning. Detailed troubleshooting is imported for H5 and the outdoor sensor batch b1-bA; other entries remain table-bound unless explicitly noted.
